sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Nullable(Int32));
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE isZeroOrNull(value) != 1;
SELECT id, isZeroOrNull(value) AS zero_null_check FROM test_table WHERE (value != 0) AND (isZeroOrNull(value) != 0);
CREATE TABLE other_table (id Int32, related_value Nullable(Float64));
SELECT ot.id FROM other_table ot JOIN test_table tt ON tt.value != ot.related_value WHERE isZeroOrNull(tt.value) != 1;
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE isZeroOrNull(value) != 0) AS subquery GROUP BY value HAVING isZeroOrNull(MAX(value)) = 0;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE isZeroOrNull(value) OR value != 0) AS filtered WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM other_table WHERE related_value != 3.0);
CREATE TABLE temp_table (col1 String, col2 Nullable(Int32));
SELECT col1 FROM temp_table WHERE isZeroOrNull(CAST(col1 AS Nullable(Int32))) != 1;
SELECT isZeroOrNull(value) AS check_val FROM test_table GROUP BY check_val HAVING check_val != 0;
